packages.approvedResponsibility: Vue 3 application runtime, Composition API, and SFC compiler consumer
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Vue is the sole authorized runtime per TECH_STACK_DECISION.md; no alternative framework is approved.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: React, Preact, Svelte, Solid, and other component runtimes are forbidden. A second runtime is not permitted.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Core runtime surface; keep pinned and review security advisories via pnpm audit.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Vue 3 release passes typecheck, production build, and owner-approved architecture review.
packages.removalCondition: Repository is rewritten under a different approved runtime; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Client-side routing and navigation guards for the Vue 3 application
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Vue Router is the approved routing layer for Vue 3; the browser History API alone does not provide route matching, guards, or view integration.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: React Router, TanStack Router, and other routers are forbidden. Only one router is permitted.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Guards authentication-sensitive routes; keep pinned and validate route behavior on upgrade.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Vue Router release passes typecheck, production build, and owner-approved architecture review.
packages.removalCondition: Application is rewritten under a different approved router; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Client-state graph and store composition for the Vue 3 application
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Pinia is the approved client-state manager for Vue 3; plain Vue reactivity lacks store dehydration, DevTools integration, and scoped module patterns used by the product.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Zustand, Redux, XState, and other state managers are forbidden. Only one client-state graph is permitted.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Holds auth and workspace state in memory; ensure persisted slices flow through approved persistence owners only.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Pinia release passes typecheck, production build, and owner-approved architecture review.
packages.removalCondition: Application migrates to an approved alternative state manager with equivalent Vue integration; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Server-read cache, deduplication, and stale-while-revalidate synchronization
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Pinia alone does not provide declarative server-read caching, background refetch, deduplication, and optimistic cache invalidation; native fetch lacks these contracts entirely.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: React Query, SWR, and other query caches are forbidden. Only one server-read cache is permitted.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Caches server responses in memory; never persists query data to localStorage/Dexie without explicit owner approval.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable TanStack Vue Query release passes typecheck, production build, API contract validation, and browser validation.
packages.removalCondition: All server-read state migrated to an approved alternative with equivalent caching and synchronization semantics.

packages.approvedResponsibility: HTTP transport for product APIs with interceptors, timeouts, and cancellation
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Native fetch lacks the interceptor, timeout, cancellation, and retry contract required by src/api/client.ts.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Only axios is authorized for HTTP transport. Native fetch is used only for narrow compatibility if explicitly approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Transports authentication tokens and user data; production configuration enforces HTTPS and tokens are confined to apiAllowlist paths.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run check:architecture
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable axios release passes API contract validation, typecheck, production build, and browser validation.
packages.removalCondition: All API transport migrated to an approved alternative with equivalent interceptor, timeout, and cancellation contracts.

packages.approvedResponsibility: FIDE-compatible chess rules, move validation, and PGN parsing
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: No browser or Vue platform API provides chess rules, move generation, or PGN parsing; reimplementing a rules engine is out of scope.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Other chess rule libraries are not approved. chess.js is the single chess domain authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Processes PGN text from users; input flows through Zod-validated boundaries before reaching chess.js.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable chess.js release passes board logic tests, PGN parsing validation, and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Chess logic migrates to an approved alternative rules engine with equivalent FIDE semantics; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Structured IndexedDB persistence for workspace layout
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: localStorage cannot hold structured object stores and lacks async transactions; IndexedDB APIs alone are too low-level for the workspace layout schema.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Only Dexie is approved for structured browser persistence. localStorage is limited to approved synchronous/session adapters.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Persists workspace layout locally; no secrets, credentials, or PGN content may be stored in Dexie.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Dexie release passes workspace persistence recovery validation and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Workspace layout migrates to an approved alternative persistence layer with equivalent IndexedDB semantics.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Timeline-based motion for board pieces, analysis panel, and workspace chrome
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: CSS transitions alone cannot express the coordinated timelines, staggers, and reduced-motion-aware sequences required by the design.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No other animation library is approved. GSAP is the single motion authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Animation library loaded into runtime; keep pinned and verify bundle size/security advisories on upgrade.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable GSAP release passes motion regression checks, production build, and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Motion requirements can be met by CSS/Web Animations API alone with owner approval.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Canonical UI primitives consumed through project-owned Vue adapters
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Rebuilding every low-level accessible primitive (button, select, modal, etc.) is not justified; Naive UI supplies canonical behavior under project adapters.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Element Plus, Ant Design Vue, Quasar, and other Vue UI libraries are forbidden. Naive UI is the only approved adapter source.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: UI primitives render user-facing surfaces; must not become the token authority and must be imported only through allowed adapter paths.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable naive-ui release passes adapter visual regression, typecheck, lint, and production build.
packages.removalCondition: All primitives replaced by project-owned components with equivalent accessibility behavior.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Runtime schema validation at API transport and persistence boundaries
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: TypeScript erases types at runtime and cannot validate untrusted network or storage payloads.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Joi, Yup, Valibot, and other validators are forbidden. Zod is the single runtime validation authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Defines the shape of trusted data entering the application; schemas must be reviewed when API or persistence contracts change.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Zod release passes typecheck, production build, and schema contract validation.
packages.removalCondition: Runtime validation migrates to an approved alternative with equivalent TypeScript inference and strictness.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Legacy browser compatibility request signing only
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: The upstream legacy endpoint requires MD5 digest matching; Web Crypto does not expose MD5.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No other hashing library is permitted. Use is isolated to the legacy compatibility signer.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: MD5 is cryptographically weak; must not be used for new security functions, only legacy compatibility signing.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run check:architecture
packages.upgradeTrigger: Legacy endpoint is decommissioned or upstream contract changes.
packages.removalCondition: Legacy compatibility signer is removed and the upstream endpoint no longer requires MD5.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Development server and production bundler for the Vue 3 application
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Vite is the approved build tool for Vue 3; no other bundler is authorized.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Webpack, Parcel, Rollup-as-bundler alternatives, and other bundlers are forbidden. Vite is the single build authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Build tool only; no runtime exposure. Review dev-server proxy configuration for accidental credential leakage.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Vite release passes production build, typecheck, and owner-approved architecture review.
packages.removalCondition: Repository migrates to an approved alternative Vue 3 build tool; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Vue SFC compilation plugin for Vite
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Official plugin required to compile .vue SFCs in Vite; no generic Vite plugin can replace it.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No alternative Vue SFC plugin is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Build-time plugin only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable plugin release passes production build and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Build pipeline migrates to an approved alternative Vue SFC compiler; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Shared Vue-specific TypeScript configuration baseline
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Plain @tsconfig packages do not include Vue SFC and embedded-language settings required by vue-tsc.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing Vue TSConfig baseline is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Type-check configuration only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable @vue/tsconfig release passes typecheck and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Vue SFC type-checking requirements can be expressed by an approved alternative baseline.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Node.js type definitions for Vite config and governance scripts
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Browser-only type libraries cannot cover Node APIs used by vite.config.ts and governance scripts.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No duplicate Node type package is needed or approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Type definitions only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Node type definitions align with the pinned Node engine and pass typecheck.
packages.removalCondition: Repository no longer uses Node APIs in config or scripts.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Type declarations for js-md5
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: TypeScript cannot infer types for the untyped js-md5 runtime package.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No alternative type package is needed; tied to js-md5.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Type definitions only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Legacy endpoint decommissioned or js-md5 replaced.
packages.removalCondition: js-md5 is removed from the runtime graph.

packages.approvedResponsibility: TypeScript compiler and language service for Vue SFC type checking
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: vue-tsc requires the stable TypeScript 6 programmatic API; the TypeScript 7 compatibility shim is unsupported by stable Vue tooling.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Only one TypeScript compiler version is permitted. TypeScript 7 is gated by the existing version exception.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Compiler tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.validationCommand: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Vue Language Tools, vue-tsc, and typescript-eslint support TypeScript 7 per the version exception.
packages.removalCondition: TypeScript 7 upgrade is approved and full static and browser validation passes.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Vue SFC type checker built on the TypeScript programmatic API
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Plain tsc cannot parse or type-check .vue SFC files; vue-tsc is the official wrapper.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No alternative Vue SFC type checker is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Type-checking tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable vue-tsc release passes typecheck, production build, and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Vue SFC type checking migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: JavaScript, TypeScript, and Vue source linting
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint is the approved project linter; no other linter is authorized.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Biome, secretlint, and other competing linters are forbidden. ESLint is the single lint authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable ESLint release passes lint and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Repository migrates to an approved alternative linter; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: ESLint core recommended rule set
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Provides the canonical ESLint recommended rules; ESLint core no longer bundles them.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing core rule set is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: ESLint configuration no longer depends on the bundled recommended rule set.

packages.approvedResponsibility: TypeScript parser and type-aware rules for ESLint
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint cannot parse TypeScript without a parser plugin; type-aware rules require the typescript-eslint integration.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing TypeScript ESLint integration is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable typescript-eslint release passes lint, typecheck, and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: TypeScript linting migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Vue-specific lint rules for SFCs
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint core cannot lint .vue SFC templates or Vue-specific patterns.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing Vue ESLint plugin is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Vue linting migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Parser for Vue SFC templates in ESLint
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint's default parser cannot parse .vue files or their template blocks.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing Vue SFC parser is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Vue SFC parsing migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Disables ESLint rules that conflict with Prettier formatting
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint core does not know which of its rules overlap with Prettier's formatting decisions.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing conflict-resolution package is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: ESLint configuration no longer conflicts with Prettier.

packages.approvedResponsibility: CSS and Vue style-block linting
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: ESLint does not validate CSS or Vue `<style>` blocks.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing CSS linter is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: CSS linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Stylelint release passes lint:style and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: CSS validation migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Baseline CSS ruleset for Stylelint
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Stylelint core does not ship an opinionated standard ruleset.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing standard ruleset is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: CSS linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint:style and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Stylelint configuration no longer depends on the standard ruleset.

packages.approvedResponsibility: PostCSS syntax for parsing CSS inside Vue SFC `<style>` blocks
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Stylelint cannot parse CSS embedded in .vue files without a custom syntax.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing Vue style syntax parser is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: CSS linting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes lint:style and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Stylelint gains native Vue style parsing or an approved alternative exists.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Authoring formatting for source and documentation files
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Prettier is the approved project formatter; no other formatter is authorized.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Biome and other competing formatters are forbidden. Prettier is the single format authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Formatting tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Prettier release passes format:check and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Repository migrates to an approved alternative formatter; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Detect unused files, exports, and dependencies
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: No built-in tool detects unused dependencies and exports across a Vite/Vue project.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: depcheck, dependency-cruiser, and madge are forbidden. Knip is the single unused-graph authority.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Static analysis tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable Knip release passes check:unused and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Unused graph migrates to an approved alternative; not expected.

packages.approvedResponsibility: Deterministic read-only command composition for governance scripts
packages.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Shell `&&` chains are less maintainable and harder to compose deterministically for the governance aggregate scripts.
packages.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: No competing command-composition package is approved.
packages.securityPrivacyImplications: Script orchestration tooling only; no runtime exposure.
packages.upgradeTrigger: Stable release passes check:governance and owner review.
packages.removalCondition: Aggregate scripts are expressed by an approved alternative mechanism.

conditionalGated.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Vue built-ins do not provide message catalogs, pluralization, or locale negotiation.
conditionalGated.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Only vue-i18n is approved for Vue i18n; alternatives are forbidden without authority.
conditionalGated.securityPrivacyImplications: Message catalogs may contain user-facing strings; review for injection if adopted.
conditionalGated.upgradeTrigger: Owner-approved i18n authority and all prerequisites exist.

conditionalGated.approvedResponsibility: MQTT/WebSocket/SSE real-time transport client (gated; not currently adopted)
conditionalGated.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Native EventSource/fetch do not provide MQTT semantics or subscription lifecycle when MQTT is the selected transport.
conditionalGated.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Transport client selection is gated; only one approved transport client may be active.
conditionalGated.securityPrivacyImplications: Transports credentials and live data; requires browser security review before adoption.
conditionalGated.upgradeTrigger: Confirmed contract selects transport and all prerequisites are authoritative.

conditionalGated.approvedResponsibility: Virtualized list rendering (gated; not currently adopted)
conditionalGated.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Native rendering cannot keep DOM size bounded for very large collections; CSS alone cannot virtualize scroll.
conditionalGated.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Virtualization library selection is gated; only one approved library may be active.
conditionalGated.securityPrivacyImplications: May intercept scrolling and focus; requires accessibility review before adoption.
conditionalGated.upgradeTrigger: Measured performance evidence and all prerequisites are authoritative.

conditionalGated.approvedResponsibility: Drag-and-drop collection reordering (gated; not currently adopted)
conditionalGated.whyExistingPlatformCannotReplaceIt: Native Pointer Events and HTML5 drag-and-drop may be insufficient for complex cross-list reordering with persistence.
conditionalGated.duplicateCapabilityAssessment: Drag-and-drop library selection is gated; only one approved library may be active.
conditionalGated.securityPrivacyImplications: May capture pointer input and alter collection order; requires keyboard-equivalent workflow review before adoption.
conditionalGated.upgradeTrigger: Keyboard-equivalent workflow, native implementation comparison, and all prerequisites are authoritative.
